topic.description: The documents discuss various tropical cyclones and their impacts during specific seasons in different regions.

Document 1: The 1984 Pacific typhoon season has no official bounds
A total of 30 tropical depressions formed in 1984 in the Western Pacific
Document 2: Hurricane Martha has been the only known tropical cyclone to make landfall in Panama
The eighteenth named storm and twelfth hurricane of the 1969 Atlantic hurricane season
Document 3: Tropical Storm Emily was a weak Atlantic tropical cyclone
The fifth named storm of the annual hurricane season

topic.name: Local History and Development
topic.description: The documents discuss the historical development and demographic details of specific locations in the United States.

Document 1: Blackford County is located in the east central portion of the U.S. state of Indiana.
The county is named for Judge Isaac Blackford, who was the first speaker of the Indiana General Assembly.
Document 2: Buford is a city in Gwinnett and Hall counties in the U.S. state of Georgia.
The city was founded in 1872 after a railroad was built in the area connecting Charlotte, NC with Atlanta.
